text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As it happens, I met with an oil tycoon just
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What in the world could T.M. Opera O be talking
about this time? By now, I'm used to her antics, so
I get straight to asking for details.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, he was quite perturbed, that oil tycoon.
Scouting me for his own country, of all things!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My prestige appears to have crossed vast
oceans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah... I was promised a life of luxury should I race
in his country.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I refused, of course! The lap of luxury is not what I
desire. I only hope for my beauty to bring
happiness to the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's a scam if I've ever heard one, but there's
no problem if she already said no.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, just a few days later...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't the oil tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue and flanked by bodyguards, a
man who appears to be this oil tycoon appears.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I won't be turned away! Your noble
presence will shine brightest on my nation's
tracks!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oil Tycoon... That is impossible.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My radiance never dims, no matter the distance!
Surely, deep down you know this to be true!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, nevertheless! If you insist on pursuing the
Overlord, then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall have a contest, Oil Tycoon—to remind
you of what lies at the core of my beauty!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
A contest, you say? Very well! Lose, and you will
accompany me back to my country!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This offer she's impulsively made goes far beyond
ridiculous. I have to make sure she wins somehow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! A contest of speed would be unfair.
And an unfair contest is anything but beautiful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, give us your recommendation—and make
it splendid!
choice_data_list: How about a racing game instead?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! It's decided. Prepare yourself, Oil
Tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O and the oil tycoon's
contest begins at the arcade.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tycoon is surprisingly good at the game. With
perfect technique right off the bat, he calmly
cruises to what looks like certain victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But right before he crosses the finish line...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You raced well, Oil Tycoon.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Argh! That move you pulled... Were you holding
back until the end?

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Lulling me into false confidence... You insult me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! You have it wrong!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Then why?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oil Tycoon... My brilliance is constant. And at
times, it can be blinding to some in the audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I conserve it until the last possible instant,
to shine through like rose petals dancing on the
wind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That the thrilling climax may forever be
remembered by my adoring fans!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
You... You were acting out of concern for the
audience?

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
But the people here are few more than my
bodyguards. You mean to say this counts as an
audience?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Low attendance is no reason to become careless.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty brings joy to one and all. Such is the
role of a king—and the Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Hic... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your beauty rings true, Opera O. It's no different
than the day I first became your fan, watching
you run across the monitor...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Oil Tycoon... I promise you this—though we
reside in different countries, my light will reach
you all the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, without a chance for me to butt in on
their wacky exchange, the contest comes to its
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I come across a headline in the
news... "The Oil Tycoon's Secret Vacation."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Photography... Indeed, a ruler is always being
viewed by the public!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! It's decided. Prepare yourself, Oil
Tycoon!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To ensure a fair contest, they decide to use the
self-timer on their phones.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The oil tycoon sits down for all his pictures. Sure,
his poses might lack dynamism, but he makes up
for it in grandeur and gravitas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The sirens forget their song. Lost in my beauty,
they weep!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bells resound in chorus to celebrate my brilliance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The swans of the lake sing songs of my dazzling
presence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She strikes one animated pose after another,
each with someone in mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The selfie session ends, and they each present
their best pictures. The result is...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: I have lost, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dear Oil Tycoon...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your consideration for others makes you shine all
the brighter in the eyes of those who gaze upon
you!

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
Your life energy comes across in every medium,
be it photo or video! This... This...

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text:
This is the feeling I had the very first time I saw
you dashing across the monitor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Enough. There is no need to speak further. So
long as you understand, that will suffice.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'll send you my pictures. After all, I couldn't allow
a fan to return empty-handed after traveling from
overseas just to see me.

text_block_list.name: Self-Proclaimed Oil Tycoon
text_block_list.text: Y-you chose this competition so that I might have these souvenirs?! My word... you are the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, without a chance for me to butt in on
their wacky exchange, the contest comes to its
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I come across a headline in the
news... "The Oil Tycoon's Secret Vacation."
